title: Google Tasks synchronization
excerpt: All our documents are stored in Google Docs, and we add all the tasks related to each project directly within those documents. However, Google Tasks has very limited functionality, which is why we’re looking for a way to…

posts.author: CarlosVeliz (Carlos)
posts.cookedHtml: All our documents are stored in Google Docs, and we add all the tasks related to each project directly within those documents. However, Google Tasks has very limited functionality, which is why we’re looking for a way to sync tasks from Google Tasks to Monday.com. We tried using the Google Calendar automation feature in Monday.com, but it only syncs calendar events, not tasks. Is there any recommended method, integration, solution to sync Google Tasks with Monday.com?
